errors.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND_EMAIL: Account not found for this email.
errors.OTP_NOT_FOUND: The provided OTP is invalid or expired.
errors.API_NAME_IS_BEING_USED: API name is already in use.
errors.API_URL_IS_BEING_USED: API URL is already in use.
errors.OTP_HAS_BEEN_USED: That OTP has already been used.

status.ACCEPTED: Request has been accepted for processing.
status.NO_CONTENT: Request succeeded but returned no content.
status.RESET_CONTENT: Request succeeded and prompted content reset.
status.PARTIAL_CONTENT: Request succeeded and returned partial content.
status.ALREADY_REPORTED: This resource has already been reported.
status.MULTIPLE_CHOICES: There are multiple choices for the requested resource.
status.MOVED_PERMANENTLY: The resource has been moved permanently.
status.FOUND_PREVIOUSLY_MOVED_TEMPORARILY: The resource has been found (previously moved temporarily).
status.SEE_OTHER: See another resource for this request.
status.NOT_MODIFIED: The resource has not been modified.
status.USE_PROXY: A proxy must be used to access this resource.
status.TEMPORARY_REDIRECT: The resource has been temporarily redirected.
status.PERMANENT_REDIRECT: The resource has been permanently redirected.
status.BAD_REQUEST: The request was invalid. Please check your input.
status.UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
status.PAYMENT_REQUIRED: Payment is required to access this resource.
status.FORBIDDEN: Access to this resource is forbidden.
status.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
status.METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: This method is not allowed for the requested resource.
status.NOT_ACCEPTABLE: The requested resource is not acceptable.
status.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: The server timed out waiting for the request.
status.CONFLICT: There was a conflict with the current state of the resource.
status.GONE: The requested resource is no longer available.
status.LENGTH_REQUIRED: The request must include the content length.
status.PRECONDITION_FAILED: The precondition for this request failed.
status.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The request payload is too large.
status.URI_TOO_LONG: The request URI is too long.
status.UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE: The media type of the request is not supported.
status.RANGE_NOT_SATISFIABLE: The range in the request is not satisfiable.
status.EXPECTATION_FAILED: The expectation in the request could not be met.
status.IM_A_TEAPOT: I'm a teapot. The requested operation cannot be performed.
status.MISDIRECTED_REQUEST: The request was misdirected to an incorrect server.
status.UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY: The request is well-formed but cannot be processed.
status.LOCKED: The resource is locked and cannot be modified.
status.TOO_EARLY: The request was sent too early.
status.UPGRADE_REQUIRED: The client must upgrade to proceed.
status.PRECONDITION_REQUIRED: Preconditions are required for this request.
status.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: You have made too many requests. Please slow down.
status.REQUEST_HEADER_FIELDS_TOO_LARGE: The request header fields are too large.
status.UNAVAILABLE_FOR_LEGAL_REASONS: This resource is unavailable for legal reasons.
status.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
status.NOT_IMPLEMENTED: This feature has not been implemented.
status.BAD_GATEWAY: The server received an invalid response from the upstream server.
status.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
status.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT: The server timed out waiting for a response from the upstream server.
status.HTTP_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED: The requested HTTP version is not supported.
status.INSUFFICIENT_STORAGE: The server has insufficient storage to complete the request.
status.LOOP_DETECTED: The server detected an infinite loop.
status.NOT_EXTENDED: Further extensions to the request are required.
